framework.name: Open Standards as Gatekeeper Prevention
framework.description: Building on open standards (WS-*, OAuth, SAML) is explicitly positioned as strategy to prevent proprietary vendor lock-in and ensure interoperability. Goal is 'any agent in an A2A/MCP ecosystem can advertise trust requirements and verify credentials seamlessly' rather than platform-specific authorization.
framework.raw_quote: What's needed is a common policy framework so any agent in an A2A/MCP ecosystem can advertise its trust requirements and verify each other's credentials seamlessly... every agent platform might implement delegation differently — a recipe for inconsistency and security holes.
